choices.text: NASA shifting: buy launches (not build), buy services (Commercial Crew). Commercial does routine; NASA focuses big leaps (Mars, deep space). Career split: NASA civil service stable lower pay; SpaceX/Blue Origin fast-paced higher pay; new space startups high risk/reward.

BS aerospace/ME/EE/CS + internships (NASA / SpaceX / Boeing) + MS for engineering roles + portfolio (capstone, open source) + conferences (AIAA, IAC) for networking. Skills: CAD, embedded, Python/C++, systems engineering, ML for autonomy.
